name: PreferredTextPlacingTypes
summary: The PreferredTextPlacingTypes class contains the available preferred text placing types. These are allowed to be used for texts.

methods.name: AlongLinePlacingType
methods.summary: The object is placed using the along line placing.

returns.doc: A new along line placing type instance.

methods.name: BaseLinePlacingType
methods.summary: The object is placed using the base line placing.

returns.doc: A new base line placing type instance.

methods.name: BaseLineWithArrowAtEndPointPlacingType
methods.summary: The object is placed using the base line placing. The line is drawn and will have an arrow at the end point.

returns.doc: A new base line with arrow at end point placing type instance.

methods.name: BaseLineWithArrowAtStartPointPlacingType
methods.summary: The object is placed using the base line placing. The line is drawn and will have an arrow at the start point.

returns.doc: A new base line with arrow at start point placing type instance.

methods.name: LeaderLinePlacingType
methods.summary: The object is placed with a leader line.

returns.doc: A new leader line placing type instance.

methods.name: PointPlacingType
methods.summary: The object is placed at one point (the insertion point) without any additional placing options.

returns.doc: A new point placing type instance.
